creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mandree
Date: Sun Dec 22 19:21:46 UTC 2019
New revision: 520652
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/520652

Log:
  New port: lang/voc (Oberon 2 compiler, GPLv3)

  Vishap Oberon Compiler is a free and open source (GPLv3) implementation of the
  Oberon-2 language and libraries for use on conventional operating systems such
  as Linux, BSD, Android, Mac and Windows.

  WWW: https://github.com/vishaps/voc/

  PR:		242809
  Submitted by:	Antranig Vartanian <antranigv@freebsd.am> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/lang/Makefile
  head/lang/voc/
  head/lang/voc/Makefile
  head/lang/voc/distinfo
  head/lang/voc/pkg-descr
  head/lang/voc/pkg-plist
